Calling All Recreational & All-Star Teams

Virginia Valor FC invites your club to compete against some of the best rec and all-star teams in Northern Virginia. Early bird registration saves $25 per team, and clubs with 10+ teams qualify for a club-wide discount. Spots fill fast, so register today.

Welcome

About the Fiesta

The Father's Day Fiesta is a two-day recreational and all-star soccer tournament held every June in the Chantilly and Centreville area of Northern Virginia. It's presented by SYA and CYA and professionally run by Virginia Valor FC.

We built this tournament for rec families. Your kids get to play competitive games against other strong programs in the area, and you get a full weekend of soccer with your family right before summer kicks off. Last year we had clubs from across the region and the energy on the fields was something special.

Beyond the games, there are activities for younger siblings, a mascot appearance, event apparel from Simax Sports, and a real tournament atmosphere with champion and finalist medals awarded in every age group. It's the kind of event kids remember.

Virginia Valor FC is a registered 501(c)(3) nonprofit

Early Bird: Save $25 Per Team

Register early and save. Clubs with 10+ teams get an additional club-wide discount.

For Coaches & Managers

Tournament Details

Everything your coaching staff needs to prepare for tournament weekend. Click any section below for full details.

Roster Entry Deadline: Saturday, June 7

Log in to your PlayMetrics account:

  • Go to "My Teams" (do not click the purple "Register" button)
  • Click your team name, then "Manage Roster"
  • Enter player name, date of birth, jersey number, and coach/manager contact info
  • Click "More Actions" to edit jersey numbers once complete

Before your first game, check in at your game site headquarters:

  • Official team roster signed by club administrator. Each player must have a unique roster number.
  • Team Check-In Form: Coaches certify they have medical release forms and will have them at every game.

Medical Release Forms: New This Year

We are not collecting medical release forms at check-in. Coaches certify possession on the check-in form instead.
